Copra Classics · Lunch
Loaded Nachos
Crispy corn chips topped with spiced beef con carne, melted cheese, fresh tomato salsa, sour cream and guacamole
FJD$34
Price
1×
Portions
8 min
Prep
8 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Base
Corn chipsg120
Protein
Spiced beef con carneg120
Topping
Cheddar cheese, gratedg60
Garnish
Fresh tomato salsag60
Sour creamg40
Guacamoleg50
Fresh corianderg5.0
Method
1
Spread corn chips in oven-proof dish or skillet.
2
Top evenly with warmed beef con carne.
3
Cover with grated cheddar.
4
Bake at 180°C for 6–8 min until cheese is melted and bubbling.
5
Top with fresh salsa. Dot sour cream and guacamole. Finish with coriander. Serve immediately.
Plating Notes
Serve in oven dish or skillet. Sour cream and guac in separate sections.
Equipment
Oven · Oven-proof dish or skillet
Allergens
DAIRY
